dsl_rule.translation_notes: Trend confirmation via ADX_14 > 25 (strong trend indicator) combined with price position relative to SMA_20. Exit conditions use 3.0% reversal threshold via returns metric and trend direction reversal (price crossing SMA_20). Trailing stop logic approximated via returns threshold over 10-bar window. Signal is context-dependent (LONG when uptrend, SHORT when downtrend).

backtest_rule.reason: Trend confirmation via ADX_14 > 25 (strong trend indicator) combined with price position relative to SMA_20. Exit conditions use 3.0% reversal threshold via returns metric and trend direction reversal (price crossing SMA_20). Trailing stop logic approximated via returns threshold over 10-bar window. Signal is context-dependent (LONG when uptrend, SHORT when downtrend).

source_rule_text: A trader should remain in a position and allow profits to run as long as the identified trend continues in the trader's favor, exiting only when the trend direction shifts.
